case_title: S & H CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION VS. PATRICK MCPOLIN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCPOLIN, PATRICK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY S & H CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT MCPOLIN, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
